task_completion.description: Verify the agent is in the correct Jitsi meeting room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser is open to the Jitsi meeting interface, and the URL or room header indicates the room name 'ManagementSync'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opens the profile settings menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Settings' modal or 'Profile' pane is open and visible over the main Jitsi meeting interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent enters the correct email address into the profile settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'alex.manager@corp.global' is typed into the 'Email' (or similar) input field within the Profile settings.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saves the configured profile settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'OK', 'Save', or equivalent confirmation button on the settings modal, or the modal is closed after entering the email.

task_completion.description: Verify the email is correctly saved and visible in the profile settings as requested.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A subsequent screenshot shows the profile settings re-opened or actively displayed, with 'alex.manager@corp.global' still present in the email field, confirming it was successfully saved.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to configure the profile.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the Jitsi UI, rather than a terminal window executing API or configuration commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Jitsi application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the correct local Jitsi URL (http://localhost:8080/ManagementSync) and not a local HTML file or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the email display.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (like the Elements or Console tabs) are NOT open in the screenshots where the email is displayed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected email to be configured is 'alex.manager@corp.global'. The Jitsi meeting room name is 'ManagementSync', and the Jitsi instance is hosted at 'http://localhost:8080'.
